metadata.name: Build & Verify
metadata.description: Standard build-verify loop. Builder implements criteria, verifier checks them.

steps.name: Builder
steps.prompt: Implement the task and make sure you fulfil the {{criteriaCount}} criteria. Mark each criterion as complete using complete_criterion when done.

steps.name: Verifier
Code Review
steps.prompt:
## Modified Files
{{modifiedFiles}}

Review the changes. Focus on:
1. **UX interaction** — does this feel good to use? Any rough edges, confusing behavior, or unnecessary friction?
2. **Project bloat** — does this follow project conventions? Is it maintainable? Does it add unnecessary complexity?

Call return_value with your findings.

steps.name: Finalize
